title: Kids Artwork Display Frames, Front Opening A4 Children Art Projects Changeable Child Artwork Storage Frames for about 50-150 Pictures Crafts Drawing (Black)
features: 【Perfect Size】The outer border of kids childrens artwork display frame is 10.4x13.8 inches, the inner border is 11.8x8.3 inches, and the depth is 0.78 inches. Suitable for A4 or smaller artwork. Stores approximately 50 -150 artworks, depending on paper thickness and 3D nature of the artwork

【High Quality Material】The clear part of the kids art display stand is made of high gloss acrylic for a clear view. The frame is environmentally friendly wood material. It is not easy to get dirty and is a good home decoration.

【Fixing Strap Design】The kids art frames projects front opening is equipped with double fixing pictures and a black elastic band with metal pins, which can easily fix various pictures. You can put it on the table as a decoration, full of artistic atmosphere.

【Horizontal and Vertical Display】Kids Art Picture Frame Front Opening A4 Frame comes with a black elastic band, easily display your picture frame horizontally or vertically on the table, counter, wall or anywhere according to your preference.

【Wide Range of Uses】This product is suitable for placing children's drawings, photos, postcards, scrapbooks, concert tickets, collectibles, pictures or any souvenirs. Children's art display is perfect as a gift for your kids and friends.
